html:
Exclusive to:

A Charged Glassy Rock is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They spawn from lightning strikes inside of Moonstorms. When mined with a Pickaxe they will drop 2-3 Infused Moon Shards.

Twenty seconds after spawning, a Charged Glassy Rock will explode, dropping no resources and dealing 30 damage to anything on top of it.

Tips

  • You can use The End is Nigh! from Wickerbottom to spawn Lightnings thereby generating Charged Glassy Rock. Also, Lightnings created with The End is Nigh! will fall into the Lightning Rod, unlike those that appear from the storm.

Trivia

  • The Charged Glassy Rock was introduced in the Eye of the Storm update.
  • Appearance of glass structures after a lightning strikes is a real life phenomenon.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

–Wortox

–Wurt
“Look at that, Woby! It's glowing!”
–Walter
“It's brimming with untapped potential!”
–Wanda
A Charged Glassy Rock is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They spawn from lightning strikes inside of Moonstorms. When mined with a Pickaxe they will drop 2-3 Infused Moon Shards.
Twenty seconds after spawning, a Charged Glassy Rock will explode, dropping no resources and dealing 30 damage to anything on top of it.

You can use The End is Nigh! from Wickerbottom to spawn Lightnings thereby generating Charged Glassy Rock. Also, Lightnings created with The End is Nigh! will fall into the Lightning Rod, unlike those that appear from the storm.

A '''Charged Glassy Rock''' is a naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. They spawn from lightning strikes inside of [[Moonstorm]]s. When mined with a [[Pickaxe]] they will drop 2-3 [[Infused Moon Shard]]s. 

Twenty seconds after spawning, a Charged Glassy Rock will explode, dropping no resources and dealing 30 damage to anything on top of it.
== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* You can use [[The End is Nigh!]] from [[Wickerbottom]] to spawn [[Lightning]]s thereby generating [[Charged Glassy Rock]]. Also, [[Lightning]]s created with [[The End is Nigh!]] will fall into the [[Lightning Rod]], unlike those that appear from the storm.
== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Charged Glassy Rock was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Eye of the Storm|Eye of the Storm]]'' update.
* Appearance of glass structures after a lightning strikes is a [[wikipedia:Fulgurite|real life phenomenon]].
